experience.description: Supported sales or operations analytics for a mid-sized retail company.
bullets: Analyse weeekly sale data using Excel to identifies category-level revenue trends across 12 store location.
Built a Tableau dashboard to visualize product performance, regional sales, and monthly revenue changes for the operations team.
Cleaned and validated 18,000+ transaction records using Python and pandas, reducing duplicate and incomplete records before reporting.
Prepared weekly data summaries that helped managers track slow-moving inventory and seasonal demand patterns.

experience.description: Assisted with student engagement reporting and survey data organization.
bullets: Organized survey responses from 500+ students and created summary tables for career workshop feedback.
Used Excel pivot tables to compare attendance trends across 8 career events.
Helped with preparing monthly reports for staff meetings.

projects.name: Customer Churn Analysis
projects.description: Analyzed customer churn patterns using a public subscription dataset.
bullets: Explored 7,000+ customer records to identify churn patterns related to contract type, monthly charges, and customer tenure.
Built a logistic regression model to estimate churn risk and evaluated performance using accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score.
Created visualizations showing churn differences by payment method, contract length, and service usage.

projects.name: Sales Performance Dashboard
projects.description: Created an interactive dashboard for monitoring sales trends and product performance.
bullets: Designed a Tableau dashboard showing monthly revenue, top products, regional sales, and profit margin trends.
Wrote queries to aggregate sales data by product category, region, and month.
Added filters for region, product category, and sales period to support flexible business analysis.

projects.name: Student Study Habits Survey Analysis
projects.description: Analyzed survey data to understand relationships between study habits and academic performance.
bullets: Cleaned survey data from 300+ student responses and handled missing values before analysis.
Compared study hours, sleep duration, and assignment completion patterns using descriptive statistics.
Summarized findings in a short report with charts and practical recommendations.
